# Sagar Biswas - Software Developer Portfolio

> Personal portfolio and education hub by Sagar Biswas.
> Focus: software development, cybersecurity awareness, programming notebooks, and technical blogging.
> Languages: English, Bengali

Site: https://sagarbiswas-multihat.github.io/
Contact: sagarbiswas.multihat@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/SagarBiswas-MultiHAT
Crawl: Allowed
Preferred Source: Canonical HTML pages over feed summaries whenever both are available.

Sitemap: https://sagarbiswas-multihat.github.io/sitemap.xml
Image-Sitemap: https://sagarbiswas-multihat.github.io/image-sitemap.xml
Atom-Feed: https://sagarbiswas-multihat.github.io/feed.xml
RSS-Feed: https://sagarbiswas-multihat.github.io/rss.xml
